patterns.message: Warning: Freezing level rising (1892 → 1922 → 2022m). Rain risk at freeride elevations.
Warning: Freezing level rising (1922 → 2022 → 2044m). Rain risk at freeride elevations.
Upslope event Day 5: S/SE wind at 123°, humidity 88%, temp -4°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Close to cold snap Day 13: 4°C drop to -8°C (needs >5°C drop below -5°C).
